phonetic: ﾋ掲ﾉ藩石ｸﾋ塡ﾉｪﾎｸ; ﾋ掲ﾉ藩石ｸﾋ塡ﾉｪﾃｰ
phoneticUs: ﾋ掲ﾉ藩甚ﾎｸﾋ塡ﾉｪﾎｸ; ﾋ掲ﾉ藩甚ﾎｸﾋ塡ﾉｪﾃｰ
examples: The agreement between us is terminated forthwith.
said the Otter, and the two animals were friends forthwith.
The main-beams of the lower deck had to be shored with screw-jacks forthwith.
Mr Megarief wants the army and the shield to close down three Benghazi militias forthwith.
Hulot, the French bureaucrat in charge of holidays, is a twit who should be fired forthwith.
